title: ASAB Christmas Bags For Gifts with Carrying Strap Handles Santa Colourful Designs Non Woven Fabric Reusable Gift Tote Bags for Christmas Holiday Presents Shopping Party (12 Pack - 4 Assorted Designs)
features: 12-PACK CHRISTMAS GIFT BAGS - Decorated with lively and colourful Christmas themes, our 12-pack gift bags showcase a range of designs, including Santa Claus, bells, reindeer, Christmas flowers, and more. Store your favourite items and enjoy the festive and joyful atmosphere of Christmas.

AMPLE STORAGE SPACE - The Christmas gift bags offer plenty of room to hold a wide array of gifts, whether it's toys, clothing, or delightful holiday treats. These reusable bags serve as a convenient option to traditional wrapping paper, eliminating the need for cutting, taping, and folding.

DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made from durable non-woven fabric, these bags can easily bear the weight of your gifts and the festive spirit of the holiday season. After the gifts have been opened, you can effortlessly fold these bags and tuck them away.

EASY TO CARRY HANDLES - Each bag is equipped with strong and elegant handles. They not only enhance the aesthetics of your gifts but also make it effortless to carry and transport your presents, ensuring they arrive in style.

DIMENSIONS - The Christmas bag measures 32.8cm (L) x 17cm (W) x 25cm (H) in size. You'll get a set of 12 gift bags with 4 different designs. Their delightful look and functional design make them a perfect selection for any festive gathering.
description: Product Description ASAB 12 Pack Christmas Bags For Gift with Carrying Strap Handles 4 Santa Colourful Designs Non Woven Fabric Reusable SET OF 12 CHRISTMAS GIFT BAGS Enhance your holiday gift-giving experience with this collection of 12 Christmas gift bags. Each set boasts delightful and charming holiday designs, bringing smiles to the faces of your loved ones. REUSABLE AND STURDY Made from high-quality non-woven fabric material, these gift bags boast durability. They are reusable and lightweight, making them easy to carry on your trips. The bags are also fade-free and odourless, ensuring a lasting and pleasant experience. LARGE STORAGE SPACE Designed to store an ample quantity of toys and gifts, our Christmas gift bags offer an excellent solution for oddly shaped or hard-to-wrap presents. They streamline the gift-wrapping process, saving time and effort. PORTABLE AND FOLDABLE With sturdy and convenient handles, these gift bags are portable and showcase long-lasting, vivid colours. Simply place your gift in the bags, include some tissue paper, and you're ready to present it. When not in use, you can easily store the bag.
